creator: jim@blues.ghis.net
text:
New port of libworkman, a library for cd audio apps.  This port is
depended on by ascd-0.13.1 so it must be committed before the ascd update
to 0.13.1, (which I'll be sending after this one).

This port isn't the same as the existing audio/workman port.. this is just
the library.
